summary: Task 11 implementation cleanly closes AC-F4 (OpenQuickChat routing) and AC-F7 (star badge + overflow default selection). Constructor-injected AppSettingsRepository, WhileSubscribed(5_000) StateFlow, per-card overflow state, snackbar-via-NavEvent, and Uri.encode of HF-style modelIds are all idiomatic. No stale OpenChat references remain in app/src/main, the tombstone route still guards deep links, and new string resources are in place. Nothing blocking.

suggestions.suggestion: LazyColumn key is entry.model.name; the rest of the card keys on entry.model.modelId. The modelId is the stable HF path (proto3 default ""). If two yet-to-be-indexed entries ever have an empty modelId on cold start, name is a safer LazyColumn key — the current choice is fine. Non-blocking observation only.
suggestions.benefit: Consistency between the composition key and the per-row identity used by isDefault/onSetDefault; current split is intentional (name is guaranteed unique in the registry) but worth a one-line comment if kept.

suggestions.suggestion: Modifier.size(20.dp).padding(end = 8.dp) applies the 8dp padding inside the 20dp-sized box, which shrinks the drawable area. Prefer Modifier.padding(end = 8.dp).size(20.dp), or put spacing on the Row via Arrangement.spacedBy. Visually minor at 20dp but technically the icon is not 20dp.
suggestions.benefit: Icon renders at the intended 20dp size; separates spacing from sizing.

suggestions.suggestion: Snackbar literal "Модель по умолчанию: $modelName" is hardcoded per task 11.md line 41 and the Russian-strings convention in CLAUDE.md, so this is acceptable. If the project later pulls user-facing VM strings into string resources, the snackbar emission can be refactored to emit a StringRes id or a typed event; not required here.
suggestions.benefit: Future-proofing for localisation; no action required now.

suggestions.suggestion: Tests declare UnconfinedTestDispatcher but also call advanceUntilIdle(). With an unconfined dispatcher, coroutines run eagerly to their first suspension and advanceUntilIdle is a no-op for already-completed work. Works correctly for the current assertions, but a StandardTestDispatcher + advanceUntilIdle would match the pattern used by HomeViewModelTest the class comment cites.
suggestions.benefit: Consistency with the referenced HomeViewModelTest pattern; no functional impact.
